steps.title: Follow the logical result
steps.content: The first sentence says natural selection was an obvious next step given the ideas circulating among British scientists. The next sentence draws a conclusion from that premise: Darwin and Wallace arriving at the idea independently may not have been a coincidence.

steps.title: Use the consequence marker
steps.content: Choice A would contrast the ideas, Choice C would merely add another point, and Choice D would introduce an example. The transition should mark the second sentence as a conclusion that follows from the first. The answer is B.
